machineSpecs.name: Flip Bits
machineSpecs.description: Flips 0s to 1s and vice versa, then halts at blank.

machineSpecs.name: Check Palindrome
machineSpecs.description: Checks if the input (over {A, B, C}) is a palindrome.

machineSpecs.name: Double X
machineSpecs.description: Doubles a string of X's preceded by $. E.g. $XXX -> $XXXXXX.

machineSpecs.name: Universal Turing Machine
machineSpecs.description: A universal Turing machine that can simulate any other TM given an encoded description on its tape.

stateDescriptions.CpNsymNav3: copy new symbol; skipping past new-state bits to reach new-symbol field
stateDescriptions.MlS2: move left; skipping past state section
stateDescriptions.CpNsymC1Fb: carrying new-symbol bit 1; finding next unmarked bit in head cell
stateDescriptions.MlNav: move left; scanning right past rules toward tape
stateDescriptions.MrExtHome: extending tape; at home, navigating to blank symbol definition
stateDescriptions.StfSkipRest: state mismatch; skipping remaining rule fields
stateDescriptions.CpNstC1W: carrying new-state bit 1; writing it into state section
stateDescriptions.CpNstNext2: copy new state; skipping past symbol bits in rule
stateDescriptions.CpNstNext3: finding next unmarked new-state bit to copy
stateDescriptions.MrS3: move right; skipping past blank section
stateDescriptions.MrPlaceHead: move right; placing head marker at new position
stateDescriptions.ReadDir: new symbol written; seeking star marker to read direction
stateDescriptions.StfGoPrev: state mismatch; going left to this rule's dot, then trying previous rule
stateDescriptions.StmGsSk1: state match cleanup; skipping past accept states to reach state section
stateDescriptions.ChkAccNextEntry: accept check; moving to next accept state entry to compare
stateDescriptions.CmpSymC0S2: carrying symbol bit 0; skipping past state section
stateDescriptions.NpNextbit: noop rule; at caret marker, skipping marked bits to read next symbol bit
stateDescriptions.StmRestoreRule: restoring marked state bits in rule back to 0/1
stateDescriptions.ChkAccC0Find: checking accept; carrying bit 0, finding next unmarked state bit
stateDescriptions.CmpStC0: carrying state bit 0 from rule; scanning right toward state section
stateDescriptions.MlS3: move left; skipping past blank section
stateDescriptions.CmpSymRead: reading next symbol bit from current rule
stateDescriptions.CpNsymC0S2: carrying new-symbol bit 0; skipping past state section
stateDescriptions.MrExtH3: extending tape; skipping past state section to reach blank definition
stateDescriptions.MrSkipCell: move right; skipping current cell to reach next cell
stateDescriptions.RdSk4: read direction; skipping past new-symbol bits in rule
stateDescriptions.Reject: rejected — no matching rule and state is not accepting
stateDescriptions.CpNsymC1S3: carrying new-symbol bit 1; skipping past blank section
stateDescriptions.CpNsymRestNav: copy new symbol; navigating right to restore tape section marks
stateDescriptions.StfRestoreState: state mismatch; restoring state section marks to 0/1
stateDescriptions.SymSkipState: state matched; skipping past state bits in rule to reach symbol field
stateDescriptions.StmGoLeft: going left past state bits to reach pipe delimiter
stateDescriptions.ChkAccBack2acc: accept check mismatch; returning to accept states section
stateDescriptions.StmRestoreState: state match cleanup; restoring marked state section bits back to 0/1
stateDescriptions.ChkAccDoRest: accept check mismatch; restoring marks in current accept entry
stateDescriptions.SmcSkipSt: match cleanup; skipping state bits in rule to reach symbol field
stateDescriptions.ChkAccC0: checking accept; carrying bit 0 from accept entry toward state section
stateDescriptions.SmcRestHead: match cleanup; restoring marked head cell bits back to 0/1
stateDescriptions.MrExtBc0: extending tape; carrying blank bit 0 to new cell
stateDescriptions.CmpSymC1Fb: carrying symbol bit 1; finding next unmarked bit in head cell
stateDescriptions.MlMark: move left; scanning left past previous cell to place head
stateDescriptions.StfFindStar: state mismatch; finding star marker to deactivate this rule
stateDescriptions.SymfSeekStar: symbol mismatch; finding star marker to deactivate this rule
stateDescriptions.ChkAccC1Find: checking accept; carrying bit 1, finding next unmarked state bit
stateDescriptions.CpNsymFnext: copy new symbol return; at star, skipping past state bits in rule
stateDescriptions.CpNstRestNav: copy new state; navigating right to restore accept/state marks
stateDescriptions.InitSeekEnd: scanning right to find end of rules section
stateDescriptions.CpNsymRnFh: copy new symbol restore; finding head marker in tape
stateDescriptions.RejectSeekHome: state is not accepting; restoring marks and seeking home
stateDescriptions.MrExtWriteHead: extending tape; head placed, seeking home to copy blank symbol
stateDescriptions.CmpSymC0: carrying symbol bit 0 from rule; scanning right past rules
stateDescriptions.CpNstC0: carrying new-state bit 0; scanning right toward state section
stateDescriptions.CpNsymDone: all new-symbol bits copied; restoring marks in new-symbol field
stateDescriptions.AccRestState: accepting; restoring state section marks to 0/1
stateDescriptions.CmpSymC0Fh: carrying symbol bit 0; finding head marker in tape
stateDescriptions.CpNsymFn2: copy new symbol return; skipping past symbol bits in rule
stateDescriptions.CpNsymC0: carrying new-symbol bit 0; scanning right past rules
stateDescriptions.CpNsymSeek: new state written; seeking star marker to begin copying new symbol
stateDescriptions.CmpStOk: state bit matched; seeking back to rule's star marker
stateDescriptions.MrS2: move right; skipping past state section
stateDescriptions.MarkRuleNoMatch: no more rules to try; scanning right to check accept states
stateDescriptions.RejFinalHome: rejecting; seeking $ to enter final reject state
stateDescriptions.StMatchCleanup: state fully matched; beginning cleanup of marks
stateDescriptions.StmBackToRule: state restored; seeking star marker to begin symbol comparison
stateDescriptions.SmcRestDone: head cell restored; seeking star marker in rule
stateDescriptions.MrExtH2: extending tape; skipping past accept states
stateDescriptions.SymfSkipRest: symbol mismatch; skipping remaining rule fields
stateDescriptions.SymfSkipSt: symbol mismatch; skipping state bits in rule to reach symbol field
stateDescriptions.CmpStC1Find: carrying state bit 1; finding next unmarked bit in state section
stateDescriptions.ChkAccInit: no rule matched; beginning to check if current state is accepting
stateDescriptions.CpNsymRnS3: copy new symbol restore; skipping past blank section
stateDescriptions.ChkAccDoRest2: accept check mismatch; continuing to restore accept entry marks
stateDescriptions.CpNsymC0S3: carrying new-symbol bit 0; skipping past blank section
stateDescriptions.CpNsymRnDo: restoring marked head cell bits back to 0/1
stateDescriptions.DoneSeekHome: head moved; seeking $ to restart simulation cycle
stateDescriptions.NpMatchPre: noop rule matched; scanning left to caret to restore before cleanup
stateDescriptions.CpNsymC1: carrying new-symbol bit 1; scanning right past rules
stateDescriptions.AcceptSeekHome: state is accepting! restoring marks and seeking home
stateDescriptions.ChkAccIntoAcc: accept check mismatch; finding current accept entry to restore
stateDescriptions.ChkAccRestState: accept check mismatch; restoring state section marks to 0/1
stateDescriptions.CmpStC0Find: carrying state bit 0; finding next unmarked bit in state section
stateDescriptions.CmpStC0Sk1: carrying state bit 0; skipping past accept states section
stateDescriptions.ChkAccOkFind: accept check; finding next marked bit in accept entry
stateDescriptions.CmpStC1Sk1: carrying state bit 1; skipping past accept states section
stateDescriptions.CmpSymFail: symbol mismatch; scanning left to head marker to restore
stateDescriptions.CmpSymOk: symbol bit matched; seeking back to rule's star marker
stateDescriptions.MrExtBcNext: extending tape; finding next unmarked blank bit to copy
stateDescriptions.CpNsymNav: copy new symbol; at star, skipping past state bits in rule
stateDescriptions.CpNstC1: carrying new-state bit 1; scanning right toward state section
stateDescriptions.CmpStNextbit: at star marker; advancing to next state bit in rule
stateDescriptions.ChkAccFailBit: accept check bit mismatch; scanning left to restore marks
stateDescriptions.RdSkipToDir: read direction; skipping past state bits in rule
stateDescriptions.SmcS1: match cleanup; skipping past accept states section
stateDescriptions.MarkRule: searching left for next rule to try
stateDescriptions.SymMatchCleanup: rule fully matched! scanning right to restore marks before applying
stateDescriptions.CpNstRestS1: copy new state; skipping past accept states to reach state section
stateDescriptions.CmpSymC1Fh: carrying symbol bit 1; finding head marker in tape
stateDescriptions.MrExtendInit: move right; hit end of tape, preparing to extend
stateDescriptions.StfRestoreRule: state mismatch; restoring marked rule bits back to 0/1
stateDescriptions.CpNsymRnS1: copy new symbol restore; skipping past accept states
stateDescriptions.CpNsymFn4: finding next unmarked new-symbol bit to copy
stateDescriptions.MlS1: move left; skipping past accept states
stateDescriptions.ChkAccOk: accept check bit matched; going back for next bit
stateDescriptions.MrExtBcRet: extending tape; blank bit written, returning for next bit
stateDescriptions.ApplyReadNst: reading next new-state bit from matched rule
stateDescriptions.RdSk2: read direction; skipping past symbol bits in rule
stateDescriptions.CmpSymC0S3: carrying symbol bit 0; skipping past blank section
stateDescriptions.CpNstRet: new-state bit written; seeking back to star marker for next bit
stateDescriptions.AccFinalHome: accepting; seeking $ to enter final accept state
stateDescriptions.MrNav: move right; scanning right past rules toward tape
stateDescriptions.CmpSymC1S3: carrying symbol bit 1; skipping past blank section
stateDescriptions.CpNstC0S1: carrying new-state bit 0; skipping past accept states
stateDescriptions.CpNstC0W: carrying new-state bit 0; writing it into state section
stateDescriptions.SmcRestSym: match cleanup; restoring marked symbol bits in rule back to 0/1
stateDescriptions.AccRestAcc: accepting; restoring accept states section marks to 0/1
stateDescriptions.CmpSymC1S2: carrying symbol bit 1; skipping past state section
stateDescriptions.CmpSymNb2: past state field pipe; finding next unmarked symbol bit in rule
stateDescriptions.CmpStFail: state mismatch; scanning left to restore state section marks
stateDescriptions.CpNstNext: copy new state; at star, skipping past state bits in rule
stateDescriptions.SmcFh: match cleanup; finding head marker in tape
stateDescriptions.MrExtBc1: extending tape; carrying blank bit 1 to new cell
stateDescriptions.SmcS2: match cleanup; skipping past state section
stateDescriptions.MrExtH1: extending tape; skipping past rules section
stateDescriptions.NpSymfRestore: noop rule mismatch; restoring current alternative, trying next
stateDescriptions.CpNstDone: all new-state bits copied; restoring marks in new-state field
stateDescriptions.MoveLeft: direction is L; scanning left to deactivate star marker
stateDescriptions.MrS1: move right; skipping past accept states
stateDescriptions.RejRestAcc: rejecting; restoring accept states section marks to 0/1
stateDescriptions.CmpSymC1: carrying symbol bit 1 from rule; scanning right past rules
stateDescriptions.MlFindHead: move left; finding head marker in tape
stateDescriptions.CmpSymC0S1: carrying symbol bit 0; skipping past accept states
stateDescriptions.MrExtReadBlank: extending tape; reading next blank symbol bit to copy
stateDescriptions.SymfRestHead: symbol mismatch; restoring marked head cell bits back to 0/1
stateDescriptions.ChkAccC1: checking accept; carrying bit 1 from accept entry toward state section
stateDescriptions.CpNsymRnS2: copy new symbol restore; skipping past state section
stateDescriptions.CmpStRead: reading next state bit from current rule
stateDescriptions.CpNsymC1Fh: carrying new-symbol bit 1; finding head marker in tape
stateDescriptions.RdSk3: read direction; skipping past new-state bits in rule
stateDescriptions.CpNsymC0Fh: carrying new-symbol bit 0; finding head marker in tape
stateDescriptions.SmcS3: match cleanup; skipping past blank section
stateDescriptions.StmGotoState: scanning right past rules to reach state section
stateDescriptions.MoveRight: direction is R; scanning left to deactivate star marker
stateDescriptions.MrExtToBlank: extending tape; scanning right to place head at new blank cell
stateDescriptions.MrExtRestBlank: extending tape; restoring blank section marks back to 0/1
stateDescriptions.NpSmcHandler: noop rule; restoring marks and skipping to direction after match
stateDescriptions.ChkAccOkAcc: accept check bit matched; scanning left through accept section
stateDescriptions.MrFindHead: move right; finding head marker in tape
stateDescriptions.CpNsymC1S2: carrying new-symbol bit 1; skipping past state section
stateDescriptions.CmpStC1: carrying state bit 1 from rule; scanning right toward state section
stateDescriptions.CpNsymFn3: copy new symbol return; skipping past new-state bits in rule
stateDescriptions.CpNsymRead: reading next new-symbol bit from matched rule
stateDescriptions.SymfRestSym: symbol mismatch; restoring marked symbol bits in rule back to 0/1
stateDescriptions.SymfDeactivate: symbol mismatch; deactivating rule and trying previous one
stateDescriptions.CpNsymC0Fb: carrying new-symbol bit 0; finding next unmarked bit in head cell
stateDescriptions.RejRestState: rejecting; restoring state section marks to 0/1
stateDescriptions.CmpSymC1S1: carrying symbol bit 1; skipping past accept states
stateDescriptions.CpNsymC0S1: carrying new-symbol bit 0; skipping past accept states
stateDescriptions.CmpSymC0Fb: carrying symbol bit 0; finding next unmarked bit in head cell
stateDescriptions.CpNsymC1S1: carrying new-symbol bit 1; skipping past accept states
stateDescriptions.CpNstC1S1: carrying new-state bit 1; skipping past accept states
stateDescriptions.CpNstRestDo: copy new state; restoring remaining marks in state section
stateDescriptions.CpNsymNav2: copy new symbol; skipping past symbol bits in rule
stateDescriptions.ChkAccOkSkip: accept check; skipping past already-matched bits
stateDescriptions.CmpSymNextbit: at star marker; advancing past state bits to next symbol bit
stateDescriptions.CpNsymRet: new-symbol bit written; seeking back to star marker for next bit
stateDescriptions.MlRestore: move left; restoring old head position as comma separator

bitFlipperSpec.name: Flip Bits
bitFlipperSpec.description: Flips 0s to 1s and vice versa, then halts at blank.

utmSpec.name: Universal Turing Machine
utmSpec.description: A universal Turing machine that can simulate any other TM given an encoded description on its tape.
